calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
EZEKIEL D. CARDER, ESQ. OF WEINBERG, ROGER & ROSENFELD, TEL. 510.337.1001, appearing for petitioners and moving party.
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; ETAL.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. The court signed the order which included fees of $1725 and costs of $450 for a total amount due and owing of $198,487.95. Judge: Harold Kahn, Not reported.
